docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-24-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO OCT-18-2021 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF DANIEL MIRER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT YANAN SUN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DOES NOT WAIVE SERVICE. ALL PARTIES PRESENT ARE NOTIFIED OF THE NEW TRIAL DATE IN COURT. NOTICE OF CONTINUED TRIAL DATE IS MAILED TO ALL PARTIES PRESENT IN COURT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF DANIEL MIRER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT YANAN SUN IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WIAVES PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. COURT VOIR DIRE PARTIES PRESENT TO DETERMINE IF SAN FRANCISCO SUPERIOR COURT IS THE PROPER VENUE FOR THIS MATTER TO BE HEARD IN. DEFENDANT RESIDES IN SAN MATEO COUNTY. COURT DETERMINES THAT THE PROPER VENUE IS IN SAN MATEO COUNTY. COURT DISMISSES THIS CASE WITHOUT PREJUDICE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
